title: engelhardia rigida
intro: Engelhardia rigida, also known as the rough Engelhardia, is a plant species in the family Juglandaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Engelhardia rigida include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a sought-after remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
